embeds.title: ❄️ The SnowHaven Empire — Information Center
embeds.description: Welcome to **The SnowHaven Empire**! Use the buttons below or the dropdown to access all server guides, roles, and resources. Stay informed, follow the rules, and enjoy the community!

footer.text: The SnowHaven Empire | tshe.noxxbot.com | Read the rules to avoid penalties.

fields.name: 🔹 Quick Access
fields.value:
- Use **buttons** for direct access to rules and roles.
- Use the **dropdown** for detailed guides.
- Check **definitions** for key terms.
- Read **moderation notes** if you're a staff member.

fields.name: 📌 Tips
fields.value:
- Stay active in chat to level up and unlock permissions.
- VIP and Nitro Boosters get all perms immediately.
- Always provide evidence when reporting members.
- Follow the escalation procedures and use proper channels.

components.placeholder: Select a guide to view more information.

options.label: 📊 AutoMod Limits
options.description: View spam limits, filters, and automod protections.

options.label: ⭐ Leveling & Roles
options.description: Level milestones, permission unlocks, and role perks.

options.label: ⚔️ Staff Hierarchy
options.description: Full staff rank list from Moderator to Foundership Team.

options.label: 🔔 Ping Roles
options.description: See all available notification roles and what they cover.

options.label: ⚠️ Warning System
options.description: Review warning levels and corresponding penalties.

options.label: 🛠️ Punishment Guide
options.description: Penalties for major offenses and how infractions escalate.

options.label: 📢 Report Help
options.description: Learn how to report violations with proper evidence.

options.label: 📚 Key Definitions
options.description: Understand terms like Toxicity, Harassment, Hate Speech.

options.label: ℹ️ Basic Information
options.description: Server channels, roles, and general guidelines.

options.label: ❓ FAQ
options.description: Frequently asked questions about the server.
